titlestmt.titleproper: Essays written using holdings of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections700
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-12-04 00:05:52 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Essays written using holdings of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
did.abstract: Collection consists of theses, essays, talks, and articles written through the use of collections now housed in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of theses, essays, talks, and articles written through the use of collections now housed in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Individual items cataloged as subunits of parent records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Essays Written Using Holdings of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, #700. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: "'Er habe auss Angsten und Forcht geredt und bekennt--er seye kein Hex': ein Hexerprozess gegen den Spitalpfrundner Nikolaus Weitlufft aus Schwabisch Gmund im Jahr 1650"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reprint from Einhorn Jahrbuch 2001, Schwabisch Gmund, Germany. On the witchcraft trial of Nikolaus Weitlufft.
